title: THE $1 CODER: This CODER COSTS $1 AND GIVES YOU $50 WORTH USAGE!
summary: CommandCode is a coding agent harness optimized for open-source language models like DeepSeek, Kimi, GLM, Qwen, and MiniMax. It includes features like model routing, caching, context handling, tool-call repair, and PR review. The platform claims DeepSeek V4 Pro outperformed Anthropic Opus 4.7 on six of ten hard evaluation slices.
